//: Example project plugin override for omp-legion. Global/project OMP config.yml files may also provide config.legion; this file is the plugin-override layer. Every field is optional.
//priority: Effective precedence (highest wins): per-request values > project plugin overrides > global plugin overrides > project config.legion > global config.legion > Legion defaults. Nested objects deep-merge by field; invalid values emit a diagnostic and fall back safely. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md §8.

coder.//: self-consistency samples only the first listed model -- list your strongest model first, and list just one to avoid the 'did you mean diverse?' warning.

decomposer.//: Independent sequential policy for the task decomposer. Runs ONE model at a time, advancing to the next selector on a retryable provider failure (quota/rate-limit/timeout). `strategy` and `ensembleSize` are NOT allowed here — omit them. Set this to use an explicit decomposer model list; when omitted, the decomposer falls back to the active session model.
